title: Add initial project structure
body:
This PR adds the basic project structure for LC-test2 including:

- README.md with project documentation
- package.json with Node.js configuration
- index.js with main application logic

The project is now ready for development with proper documentation and configuration files.
head: open-swe/e74415ff-f120-4e4d-b285-954e8b2583e2
